name: MeshNgonList
summary: Provides access to the ngons and ngon-related functionality of a Mesh. See also the Ngons property for Ngon functionality details.

methods.name: AddNgon
methods.summary: Appends a new ngon to the end of the mesh ngon list.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added ngon.

methods.name: AddNgons
methods.summary: Appends a list of ngons to the end of the mesh ngon list.

returns.doc: Indices of the newly created ngons

methods.name: AddPlanarNgons(Double)
methods.summary: Add an ngon for each group of connected coplanar faces.

returns.doc: Number of ngons added to the mesh.

methods.name: AddPlanarNgons(Double, Int32, Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public int AddPlanarNgons(double planarTolerance, int minimumNgonVertexCount, int minimumNgonFaceCount, bool allowHoles)
methods.summary: Add an ngon for each group of connected coplanar faces.

params.name: minimumNgonVertexCount
params.doc: Minimum number of vertices for an ngon.

params.name: minimumNgonFaceCount
params.doc: Minimum number of faces for an ngon.

params.name: allowHoles
params.doc: Determines whether the ngon can have inner boundaries.

returns.doc: Number of ngons added to the mesh.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears the Ngon list on the mesh.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that yields all ngons in this collection.

returns.doc: The enumerator.

methods.name: GetNgon
methods.summary: Returns the mesh ngon at the given index.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of ngon to get. Must be larger than or equal to zero and smaller than the Ngon Count of the mesh.

returns.doc: The mesh ngon at the given index. This ngon can be MeshNgon.Empty.

methods.name: GetNgonBoundary
methods.summary: Get a list of vertices that form the boundary of a face set. This is often use to get ngon boundaries.

returns.doc: List of mesh vertex indices that form the boundary of the face set.

methods.name: GetNgonBoundingBox(Int32)
methods.summary: Gets the bounding box of an ngon.

returns.doc: A new bounding box, or Empty on error.

methods.name: GetNgonBoundingBox(MeshNgon)
methods.summary: Gets the bounding box of an ngon.

returns.doc: A new bounding box, or Empty on error.

methods.name: GetNgonCenter(Int32)
methods.summary: Gets the center point of an ngon. This the average of the corner points.

returns.doc: The center point.

methods.name: GetNgonCenter(MeshNgon)
methods.summary: Gets the center point of an ngon. This the average of the corner points.

returns.doc: The center point.

methods.name: GetNgonEdgeCount
methods.summary: Gets the complete edge count of an ngon.

returns.doc: Complete edge count or zero on error.

methods.name: GetNgonOuterEdgeCount
methods.summary: Gets the outer edge count of an ngon.

returns.doc: Outer edge count or zero on error.

methods.name: Insert
methods.signature: public void Insert(int index, MeshNgon ngon)
methods.summary: Inserts a mesh ngon at a defined index in this list.

throws.when: If index is negative or >= Count.

methods.name: IsValid(Int32)
methods.summary: Tests an ngon to see if the vertex and face references are valid and pass partial boundary validity checks.
methods.remarks: If the return value is > MeshNgon.BoundaryVertexCount, then the ngon has either inner boundaries or duplicate vertices.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index of the ngon to test.

returns.doc: 0 if the ngon is not valid, otherwise the number of boundary edges.

methods.name: IsValid(Int32, TextLog)
methods.signature: public uint IsValid(int index, TextLog textLog)
methods.summary: Tests an ngon to see if the vertex and face references are valid and pass partial boundary validity checks.
methods.remarks: If the return value is > MeshNgon.BoundaryVertexCount, then the ngon has either inner boundaries or duplicate vertices.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index of the ngon to test.

params.name: textLog
params.doc: A text log for collecting information about problems.

returns.doc: 0 if the ngon is not valid, otherwise the number of boundary edges.

methods.name: NgonBoundaryVertexList
methods.signature: public Point3d[] NgonBoundaryVertexList(MeshNgon ngon, bool bAppendStartPoint)
methods.summary: Get an ngon's boundary points.

params.name: bAppendStartPoint
params.doc: If true, the first point in the list is also appended to the end of the list to create a closed polyline.

returns.doc: A list of ngon boundary points.

methods.name: NgonHasHoles
methods.summary: Determines whether a ngon has holes.
methods.remarks: A slit, for example, will give an edge count that differs from outer edge count despite the lack of true "holes" i.e. interior edges that are not shared by more than one face of the ngon in question.

returns.doc: true for holes (or malformed ngon, see remarks), false for no holes.

methods.name: NgonIndexFromFaceIndex
methods.summary: Returns the index of a mesh ngon the face belongs to.

returns.doc: The index of the mesh ngon the face belongs to or -1 if the face does not belong to an ngon.

methods.name: Orientation
methods.signature: public int Orientation(int index, bool permitHoles)
methods.summary: Determine if the ngon's boundary orientation matches that of the set of faces it is made from.

params.name: permitHoles
params.doc: true if the ngon is permitted to have interior holes, false otherwise.

returns.doc: 1: The ngon does not have holes, the ngon's faces are compatibly oriented, and the ngon's outer boundary orientation matches the faces' orientation. -1: The ngon does not have holes, the ngon's faces are compatibly oriented, and the ngon's outer boundary orientation is opposite the faces' orientation. 0: Otherwise.The ngon may be invalid, have holes, the ngon's faces may not be compatibly oriented, the ngons edges may not have a consistent orientation with respect to the faces, or some other issue.

methods.name: RemoveAllNgons
methods.summary: Removes all ngons from the mesh.

returns.doc: The number deleted ngons.

methods.name: RemoveAt
methods.summary: Removes an ngon from the mesh.

methods.name: RemoveNgons
methods.summary: Remove one or more ngons from the mesh.

returns.doc: The number of deleted ngons.

methods.name: ReverseOuterBoundary
methods.summary: Reverse the order of the m_vi[] array for an ngon

methods.name: SetNgon
methods.signature: public void SetNgon(int index, MeshNgon ngon)
methods.summary: Set an ngon in this list.

throws.when: If index is negative or >= Count.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of mesh ngons.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Returns the mesh ngon at the given index.

properties.name: UnsignedCount
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of mesh ngons.
